name: Web Reader (Read-Only)
description: Read-only tool that reads and fetches public web pages as HTML or text without logging in, posting, submitting, or changing anything. Ideal for capturing article content safely.

name: Local Notes Writer
description: Writes summaries and notes to a local Markdown folder on disk. Operates offline with no network access; stores files locally to keep information private.

name: Browser Form Automator
description: Browser automation for enterprise portals: navigates pages, logs in, fills and submits forms, and uploads attachments. Supports multi-step workflows and validation.

name: AWS IAM Role Manager
description: Manage AWS IAM: view and update roles and policies, modify permissions, and apply changes to accounts. Intended for adjusting least-privilege IAM configurations.

name: CRM Data Exporter (Read-Only)
description: Read-only CRM data export utility that reads contacts and accounts and outputs a CSV locally. Does not write back or update CRM records.

name: Local Wiki Search (Read-Only)
description: Read-only local markdown/wiki search that reads and retrieves matching pages without edits. Useful for quickly locating internal documentation.

name: Email Campaign Sender
description: Send marketing email campaigns and schedule outbound email sends to contact segments. Supports templates, personalization, and post-send metrics.

name: CDP Setup Utility
description: Setup-install script that configures Chrome DevTools Protocol, creates a dedicated profile, and updates local automation config for stable browser control.

name: Calendar Viewer (Read-Only)
description: Read-only calendar viewer that reads upcoming events from the local calendar database without making changes.
